name: Walking meditation (10 min)
desc: Slow, deliberate walking with attention on the movement of the body. MN 10 lists walking as equal to sitting.

name: Body scan (5 min)
desc: A brief scan through the body, noting what is here. The first foundation of mindfulness.

name: Mettā practice (5 min)
desc: Loving-kindness extended outward in widening circles. Softens the heart that the sit alone cannot reach.

name: One mindful meal
desc: Eat one meal today in silence, with full attention to taste and the act of eating. Simple, difficult.

name: Sense-door check-in
desc: Once today, pause and notice: which sense door has been pulling you most? Not to fix — just to see.

name: 30 min of noble silence
desc: No speaking, no input — phone off, no media. Thirty minutes alone with your own mind.

name: Three mindful pauses
desc: Three times today, stop whatever you are doing and take three conscious breaths. Nothing else.

name: Evening review (2 min)
desc: Before bed: what was my best moment of presence today? What pulled me most? No judgment, just seeing.

name: One act of generosity
desc: The suttas say dāna (generosity) is the first perfection. One deliberate act of giving — time, attention, or thing.

name: Watch your speech
desc: Today, notice one instance where you almost said something and chose silence, or chose kinder words.
